introSection: Family Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by UK showmen Michael Wallis Jnr. & William Abbott. During winter events the coaster is transformed into Santa's Roller Coaster. Since 2021 the coaster has been sited at New Palace and Adventureland in New Brighton, Merseyside, England, UK.
fullText: Family Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by UK showmen Michael Wallis Jnr. & William Abbott. During winter events the coaster is transformed into Santa's Roller Coaster. Since 2021 the coaster has been sited at New Palace and Adventureland in New Brighton, Merseyside, England, UK.
